name: Fumpers: Dual Realms
short_description: Fumpers 2 delivers a chaotic platforming experience that tests your reflexes and patience. Stay alert through physics-based gameplay, surprising obstacles, and challenging levels. Don’t fall. Don’t quit.
detailed_description:
Fumpers 2 is a chaotic platformer that pushes your reflexes, patience, and control skills to their limits. Thanks to its physics-based gameplay, every jump, fall, and move can lead to different outcomes. As levels progress, increasing difficulty, unexpected obstacles, and surprising mechanics keep you constantly on edge.

The controls may seem simple at first, but mastering them is a real challenge. The game pulls players into a loop of trial and error where every failure teaches a lesson and every success delivers a brief yet satisfying victory. Fumpers 2 is designed for players who refuse to give up.

Staying upright, timing your moves, and using the laws of physics to your advantage are the keys to survival. Be patient. Learn. Try again. Because winning in this world isn’t easy… but when you succeed, it’s deeply rewarding.

reviews.review_text: oyun ♥♥♥ güzel alışınca dahada güzel oluyo iki farklı dünyada geçmesi ayrı hoş hava katmış

Fumpers: Dual Realms is a surprisingly fun and addictive experience. The gameplay feels smooth, the mechanics are easy to learn but still challenging enough to keep you playing. The level design and overall style give the game a unique charm that makes it stand out from many indie titles.

It’s one of those games where you start playing “just for a few minutes” and suddenly an hour has passed. If you enjoy skill-based games with satisfying progression, this one is definitely worth checking out.

Great job from the developer. Looking forward to future updates!
I can see the improvement since the last game, if you like games like ALT F4, you'll like this game too! Parkours can be annoying sometimes but that's the fun part.
